material_import_mapping_items_json_ck.name: material_import_mapping_items_json_ck
material_import_mapping_items_json_ck.value: jsonb_typeof("material_import_mapping_items"."source_column_indexes")='array' and jsonb_array_length("material_import_mapping_items"."source_column_indexes") between 0 and 8 and jsonb_typeof("material_import_mapping_items"."source_headers")='array' and jsonb_array_length("material_import_mapping_items"."source_headers") between 0 and 8 and jsonb_typeof("material_import_mapping_items"."mapping_evidence")='array'

material_import_mapping_items_values_ck.name: material_import_mapping_items_values_ck
material_import_mapping_items_values_ck.value: "material_import_mapping_items"."display_order" between 0 and 255 and "material_import_mapping_items"."mapping_confidence" between 0 and 1 and length("material_import_mapping_items"."combination_separator")<=10 and "material_import_mapping_items"."combination_strategy" in ('FIRST_NON_EMPTY','JOIN_NON_EMPTY','SPECIFICATION_EXTRACT') and "material_import_mapping_items"."adaptive_mapping_status" in ('EXACT','HIGH_CONFIDENCE','SUGGESTED','UNMAPPED','CONFLICT','CONFIRMED')

material_import_mappings_confirm_ck.name: material_import_mappings_confirm_ck
material_import_mappings_confirm_ck.value: ("material_import_mappings"."status"='CONFIRMED' and "material_import_mappings"."confirmed_by" is not null and "material_import_mappings"."confirmed_at" is not null and "material_import_mappings"."mapping_snapshot" is not null) or "material_import_mappings"."status"<>'CONFIRMED'

material_import_mappings_stale_ck.name: material_import_mappings_stale_ck
material_import_mappings_stale_ck.value: ("material_import_mappings"."status"='STALE' and "material_import_mappings"."stale_reason_code" is not null and "material_import_mappings"."stale_reason" is not null and "material_import_mappings"."invalidated_at" is not null) or "material_import_mappings"."status"<>'STALE'

material_import_normalization_issues_cod.name: material_import_normalization_issues_code_ck
material_import_normalization_issues_cod.value: "material_import_normalization_issues"."issue_code" ~ '^[A-Z][A-Z0-9_]{2,99}$' and length("material_import_normalization_issues"."target_code") between 3 and 160 and length("material_import_normalization_issues"."safe_message") between 1 and 500 and "material_import_normalization_issues"."rule_code" ~ '^[A-Z][A-Z0-9_]{2,127}$'

material_import_normalization_runs_diges.name: material_import_normalization_runs_digest_ck
material_import_normalization_runs_diges.value: "material_import_normalization_runs"."mapping_digest" ~ '^[0-9a-f]{64}$' and "material_import_normalization_runs"."source_schema_digest" ~ '^[0-9a-f]{64}$' and "material_import_normalization_runs"."metadata_digest" ~ '^[0-9a-f]{64}$' and ("material_import_normalization_runs"."result_digest" is null or "material_import_normalization_runs"."result_digest" ~ '^[0-9a-f]{64}$')

material_import_normalization_runs_count.name: material_import_normalization_runs_counts_ck
material_import_normalization_runs_count.value: "material_import_normalization_runs"."run_version">0 and "material_import_normalization_runs"."expected_version">0 and "material_import_normalization_runs"."retry_count">=0 and "material_import_normalization_runs"."attempt_no">0 and "material_import_normalization_runs"."total_rows">=0 and "material_import_normalization_runs"."processed_rows" between 0 and "material_import_normalization_runs"."total_rows" and "material_import_normalization_runs"."valid_rows">=0 and "material_import_normalization_runs"."warning_rows">=0 and "material_import_normalization_runs"."error_rows">=0 and "material_import_normalization_runs"."skipped_rows">=0 and "material_import_normalization_runs"."valid_rows"+"material_import_normalization_runs"."warning_rows"+"material_import_normalization_runs"."error_rows"+"material_import_normalization_runs"."skipped_rows"<="material_import_normalization_runs"."processed_rows" and "material_import_normalization_runs"."issue_count">=0 and "material_import_normalization_runs"."warning_count">=0 and "material_import_normalization_runs"."error_count">=0 and "material_import_normalization_runs"."warning_count"+"material_import_normalization_runs"."error_count"="material_import_normalization_runs"."issue_count" and "material_import_normalization_runs"."normalized_json_bytes">=0

material_import_normalization_runs_publi.name: material_import_normalization_runs_publish_ck
material_import_normalization_runs_publi.value: ("material_import_normalization_runs"."run_status" in ('SUCCEEDED','SUPERSEDED') and "material_import_normalization_runs"."published_at" is not null and "material_import_normalization_runs"."result_digest" is not null and "material_import_normalization_runs"."completed_at" is not null) or ("material_import_normalization_runs"."run_status" not in ('SUCCEEDED','SUPERSEDED') and "material_import_normalization_runs"."published_at" is null)

material_import_normalization_runs_cance.name: material_import_normalization_runs_cancel_ck
material_import_normalization_runs_cance.value: ("material_import_normalization_runs"."run_status"='CANCEL_REQUESTED' and "material_import_normalization_runs"."cancel_requested_at" is not null and "material_import_normalization_runs"."cancelled_by" is not null and "material_import_normalization_runs"."cancelled_at" is null) or ("material_import_normalization_runs"."run_status"='CANCELLED' and "material_import_normalization_runs"."cancel_requested_at" is not null and "material_import_normalization_runs"."cancelled_by" is not null and "material_import_normalization_runs"."cancelled_at" is not null) or ("material_import_normalization_runs"."run_status" not in ('CANCEL_REQUESTED','CANCELLED') and "material_import_normalization_runs"."cancel_requested_at" is null and "material_import_normalization_runs"."cancelled_at" is null and "material_import_normalization_runs"."cancelled_by" is null)

material_import_normalization_runs_failu.name: material_import_normalization_runs_failure_ck
material_import_normalization_runs_failu.value: ("material_import_normalization_runs"."run_status"='FAILED' and "material_import_normalization_runs"."failure_code" is not null and length(trim("material_import_normalization_runs"."failure_code")) between 3 and 100 and "material_import_normalization_runs"."safe_failure_message" is not null) or ("material_import_normalization_runs"."run_status"<>'FAILED' and "material_import_normalization_runs"."failure_code" is null and "material_import_normalization_runs"."safe_failure_message" is null)

material_import_normalized_attribute_can.name: material_import_normalized_attribute_candidates_size_ck
material_import_normalized_attribute_can.value: ("material_import_normalized_attribute_candidates"."raw_value" is null or pg_column_size("material_import_normalized_attribute_candidates"."raw_value")<=16384) and ("material_import_normalized_attribute_candidates"."normalized_value" is null or pg_column_size("material_import_normalized_attribute_candidates"."normalized_value")<=16384)

material_import_normalized_field_candida.name: material_import_normalized_field_candidates_size_ck
material_import_normalized_field_candida.value: ("material_import_normalized_field_candidates"."raw_value" is null or pg_column_size("material_import_normalized_field_candidates"."raw_value")<=16384) and ("material_import_normalized_field_candidates"."normalized_value" is null or pg_column_size("material_import_normalized_field_candidates"."normalized_value")<=16384)

material_import_normalized_rows_status_c.name: material_import_normalized_rows_status_ck
material_import_normalized_rows_status_c.value: ("material_import_normalized_rows"."row_status"='VALID' and "material_import_normalized_rows"."error_count"=0 and "material_import_normalized_rows"."warning_count"=0) or ("material_import_normalized_rows"."row_status"='WARNING' and "material_import_normalized_rows"."error_count"=0 and "material_import_normalized_rows"."warning_count">0) or ("material_import_normalized_rows"."row_status"='ERROR' and "material_import_normalized_rows"."error_count">0) or ("material_import_normalized_rows"."row_status"='SKIPPED' and "material_import_normalized_rows"."error_count"=0 and "material_import_normalized_rows"."warning_count"=0)

material_import_normalized_rows_payload_.name: material_import_normalized_rows_payload_ck
material_import_normalized_rows_payload_.value: jsonb_typeof("material_import_normalized_rows"."normalized_payload")='object' and pg_column_size("material_import_normalized_rows"."normalized_payload")<=262144 and ("material_import_normalized_rows"."mapped_values" is null or jsonb_typeof("material_import_normalized_rows"."mapped_values")='object') and jsonb_typeof("material_import_normalized_rows"."result_summary")='object'
